scripts.pack:server: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:extensions:if-needed && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:python && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:ffmpeg && pnpm --filter @agentx/runtime run setup:voice-bundled && pnpm run build && node scripts/pack-server.mjs
